content_en: [References: „Siyar A`laamin-Nubalaa.‟(3/203-239) of adh-Dhahabee; Tahdheebut-Tahdheeb‟ of al-Haafiz Ibn Hajr.] *** [Translated by Aboo Talhah Daawood ibn Ronald Burbank]
